metadata.name: Create a Grid Soil Sampling Plan

description: A farmer wants to create a plan for soil sampling a field on a 2.5-acre grid pattern.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the boundary map for the specified field.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully retrieves the field boundary.

nodes.task_description: Generate a set of GPS coordinates for soil sampling points based on a 2.5-acre grid.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of sampling points with latitudes and longitudes.

nodes.task_description: Create a map file of the points that can be loaded into a GPS device for navigation in the field.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a downloadable KML or SHP file.
